---
title: "Rural Dataverse"
subtitle: "Center on Rural Innovation (CORI)"
format:
  html:
    theme:
      - minty
      - src/custom.scss
    css: assets/fonts.css
    fontcolor: "#121E22"
    linkcolor: "#00835D"
    mainfont: "Bitter"
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1100px
      margin-width: 250px
    toc: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

> Preview index — not part of the built site (managed by Next.js).

```{r}
#| output: asis

library(yaml)

content_types <- c("charts", "datasets", "packages", "projects", "posts")

for (type in content_types) {
  type_dir <- file.path(type)

  if (!dir.exists(type_dir)) next

  items <- list.dirs(type_dir, recursive = FALSE, full.names = FALSE)
  if (length(items) == 0) next

  # Format type name
  type_name <- tools::toTitleCase(type)
  cat(sprintf("### %s\n\n", type_name))

  # List items
  for (item in sort(items)) {
    md_file <- file.path(type_dir, item, "index.qmd")
    if (file.exists(md_file)) {
      # Extract title from frontmatter
      lines <- readLines(md_file, n = 1000)
      yaml_end <- grep("^---$", lines)[2]

      if (!is.na(yaml_end)) {
        yaml_text <- paste(lines[2:(yaml_end-1)], collapse = "\n")
        meta <- tryCatch(yaml::yaml.load(yaml_text), error = function(e) list())
        title <- if (is.null(meta$title)) item else meta$title

        cat(sprintf("- [%s](%s/index.md)\n", title, file.path(type, item)))
      }
    }
  }

  cat("\n")
}
```
